metadata.title: About the Race — Cape Town Marathon 2027
metadata.description: Africa's first Abbott World Marathon Major. History, course, records, and what makes Cape Town 2027 legendary.

hero.title: Africa's First
hero.subtitle: From candidacy to history. The Sanlam Cape Town Marathon joins the world's most prestigious marathon series in 2027.

1994.title: The Beginning
1994.desc: First edition with 500 runners. Julian Paul wins in 2:26:45.

2014.title: Rapid Growth
2014.desc: Race expands to 10,000+ participants. Becomes South Africa's premier road race.

2024.title: AbbottWMM Candidate
2024.desc: Officially enters candidacy period for Abbott World Marathon Majors.

2026.title: Final Assessment
2026.desc: Record-breaking edition. Mohamed Esa runs 2:04:55 — fastest marathon on African soil.

2027.title: Africa's First Major
2027.desc: Officially joins Tokyo, Boston, London, Berlin, Chicago, New York, and Sydney as the 8th AbbottWMM.

wmm.title: Joining the World's
wmm.subtitle: The Abbott World Marathon Majors is a series of the world's largest and most renowned marathons. Cape Town becomes the 8th member and the first from Africa.

course.title: 42.2 Kilometers of
course.subtitle: Start and finish at Green Point Stadium. A scenic coastal route with Table Mountain as your constant companion.
course.note: The final 5km features the famous 'Loop of Death' — passing the finish line before one final push to glory.

records.title: Records Made to
records.menDesc: Fastest marathon ever run on African soil on a certified course
records.womenDesc: South African national record set on home soil
records.legendDesc: Two-time Olympic champion's first marathon on African soil

cta.title: Be Part of
cta.subtitle: Join 20,000+ runners at Africa's first Abbott World Marathon Major. Entries open 10–24 June 2026.

metadata.title: Prep Camp — Cape Town Marathon 2027
metadata.description: 7-day elite marathon prep camp in Cape Town. Train with world-class coaches, recover in luxury, and arrive at the start line ready.

hero.title: Train Like a
hero.subtitle: An intensive 7-day prep camp designed for marathon runners. Elite coaching, luxury recovery, and race-ready preparation in the heart of Cape Town.

program.title: 7 Days to
program.subtitle: Every day is designed to build fitness, sharpen speed, and ensure you arrive at the start line in perfect condition.

day1.label: Day 1
day1.title: Arrival & Assessment
day1.desc: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, biomechanical analysis, and easy shake-out run along Sea Point promenade.

day2.label: Day 2
day2.title: Base Building
day2.desc: Long aerobic run on Chapman's Peak Drive. Afternoon yoga and nutrition workshop with team dietitian.

day3.label: Day 3
day3.title: Speed & Hills
day3.desc: Track session at Green Point Stadium. Hill repeats on Signal Hill. Evening ice bath and physio.

day4.label: Day 4
day4.title: Active Recovery
day4.desc: Easy run on the beach. Table Mountain hike for altitude adaptation. Spa and massage session.

day5.label: Day 5
day5.title: Race Simulation
day5.desc: Half-marathon tempo on the actual marathon course. Pace strategy session with your assigned coach.

day6.label: Day 6
day6.title: Taper & Tuning
day6.desc: Short intervals and strides. Final biomechanical check. Race day briefing and kit distribution.

day7.label: Day 7
day7.title: Race Day
day7.desc: Morning warm-up with coaches. Transport to start line. Post-race celebration and awards ceremony.

coaches.title: World-Class
coaches.subtitle: Learn from coaches who have trained Olympic medalists and world record holders.
coaches.noTrainers: No trainers available at the moment.

accommodation.title: Recovery in
accommodation.subtitle: 5-star accommodation with athlete-focused amenities. Sleep, eat, and recover like a pro.

hotel.title: Waterfront Hotel
hotel.desc: 5-star hotel 500m from the start line. Ocean views, athlete-friendly breakfast from 4:30 AM.

nutrition.title: Performance Nutrition
nutrition.desc: Personalized meal plans by sports dietitian. Carb-loading menus, hydration protocols, supplements.

spa.title: Recovery Spa
spa.desc: Daily physio, ice baths, compression therapy, and sports massage included in all packages.

transport.title: Door-to-Door Transport
transport.desc: All training venues, race start, and airport transfers covered. No logistics stress.

schedule.title: A Typical
schedule.subtitle: Structured, balanced, and optimized for marathon performance.
schedule.morningDesc: Wake-up, breakfast, training session (run/track/hills), cool-down stretch
schedule.afternoonDesc: Lunch, recovery session (spa/ice bath/massage), coach debrief
schedule.eveningDesc: Workshop or seminar, dinner, free time, lights out by 21:30

pricing.title: Choose Your
pricing.subtitle: All packages include accommodation, meals, coaching, transport, and race entry.

essential.name: Essential
essential.desc: Shared room, group coaching, all meals, transport, race entry

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Private room, semi-private coaching, daily physio, priority start

elite.name: Elite
elite.desc: Suite, 1:1 coaching, personal physio, nutritionist, VIP race experience

cta.title: Ready to
cta.subtitle: Spots are limited to 40 runners per camp. Reserve your place today.

hero.title: The Week of
hero.subtitle: Four days of excitement, preparation, and celebration leading up to race day.

courseBriefing.title: Course Briefing
courseBriefing.desc: Official race briefing with course director

welcomeParty.title: Welcome Party

shakeOutRun.title: Shake-out Run
shakeOutRun.desc: Easy 3km jog with pacers along Sea Point

nutritionWorkshop.title: Nutrition Workshop
nutritionWorkshop.desc: Race day fueling strategies with sports nutritionist

photoWalk.title: Photo Walk
photoWalk.desc: Guided tour of Cape Town's most Instagrammable spots

expoFinalDay.title: Expo Final Day
expoFinalDay.desc: Last chance for race merchandise and gear checks

elitePressConference.title: Elite Press Conference
elitePressConference.desc: Meet the elite field and race ambassadors

pastaDinner.title: Pasta Dinner
pastaDinner.desc: Carb-loading dinner for all registered runners

gatesOpen.title: Gates Open
gatesOpen.desc: Arrive early for bag drop and warm-up

awardsCeremony.title: Awards Ceremony
awardsCeremony.desc: Celebrate finishers at Green Point Stadium

afterParty.title: After Party
afterParty.desc: Live music, food trucks, and victory celebrations

safari.title: Extend Your Adventure
safari.subtitle: Celebrate your finish with an unforgettable South African experience

tableMountain.name: Table Mountain Safari
tableMountain.desc: Cable car up Table Mountain with guided hike

capePoint.name: Cape Point Tour
capePoint.desc: Visit the Cape of Good Hope and Boulders Beach penguins

winelands.name: Winelands Experience
winelands.desc: Stellenbosch and Franschhoek wine tasting tour

bigFive.name: Big Five Safari
bigFive.desc: Aquila Game Reserve — lion, elephant, buffalo, rhino, leopard

metadata.title: Cape Town Guide — Marathon 2027
metadata.description: Discover Cape Town: attractions, weather, and runner tips for the 2027 marathon.

hero.title: Discover
hero.subtitle: The Mother City awaits. Explore the best attractions, weather, and runner-specific tips.
hero.imageAlt: Table Mountain with cable car and fynbos vegetation

attractions.title: Must-See Attractions
attractions.subtitle: Don't miss these iconic Cape Town experiences

tableMountain.name: Table Mountain
tableMountain.desc: Take the cable car or hike to the top for panoramic views of the city and ocean.
tableMountain.tip: Book cable car tickets online to skip queues

vaWaterfront.name: V&A Waterfront
vaWaterfront.desc: World-class shopping, dining, and entertainment at the historic harbor.
vaWaterfront.tip: Visit the Two Oceans Aquarium for a unique experience

capePoint.name: Cape Point
capePoint.desc: Where the Atlantic and Indian Oceans meet. Dramatic cliffs and lighthouse.
capePoint.tip: Arrive early to avoid crowds and heat

bouldersBeach.name: Boulders Beach
bouldersBeach.desc: Walk among a colony of African penguins on this sheltered beach.
bouldersBeach.tip: Best visited in the morning when penguins are most active

kirstenbosch.name: Kirstenbosch Gardens
kirstenbosch.desc: One of the world's great botanical gardens at the foot of Table Mountain.
kirstenbosch.tip: Pack a picnic and enjoy the sunset concerts

boKaap.name: Bo-Kaap
boKaap.desc: Colorful houses and rich Cape Malay culture in this historic neighborhood.
boKaap.tip: Respect residents' privacy when taking photos

weather.title: Weather by Month
weather.subtitle: Plan your visit with our seasonal guide

runnerTips.title: Runner's Guide to Cape Town
runnerTips.subtitle: Essential tips for training and racing in the Mother City

sunProtection.title: Sun Protection
sunProtection.desc: Cape Town sun is intense. Use SPF 50+ and wear a cap during training runs.

hydration.title: Hydration
hydration.desc: The dry climate can be deceptive. Drink 500ml water per hour of running.

capeDoctor.title: The Cape Doctor
capeDoctor.desc: The southeasterly wind (Cape Doctor) typically picks up after 10am. Run early.

temperature.title: Temperature Swings
temperature.desc: Mornings can be cool (10-12°C) even in October. Layer your race outfit.

trailRunning.title: Trail Running
trailRunning.desc: Try the Pipe Track or Lion's Head trails for stunning off-road runs.

coffee.title: Coffee Culture
coffee.desc: Cape Town has incredible coffee. Try Truth Coffee or Origin for pre-run fuel.

pricing.title: Choose Your
pricing.subtitle: All entries include race timing, medical support, and finisher recognition. No hidden fees. No surprises.

elite.name: Elite
elite.description: For serious runners seeking peak performance

blog.title: Race Insights
blog.subtitle: Training tips, race stories, and everything you need to know about running in Cape Town.

posts.excerpt: Expert advice from elite coaches on preparing for Africa's major marathon.

posts.excerpt: Combine your marathon trip with an unforgettable wildlife experience.

posts.excerpt: What to eat before, during, and after the big race.

posts.excerpt: Explore the most scenic trails and roads for your training runs.

posts.title: Gear Guide: What to Pack for Cape Town
posts.excerpt: Essential gear recommendations for running in Cape Town's conditions.
